content.headline: Data-Driven Marketing That Scales—SEO, Paid Ads, Social & More
content.subtitle: From digital strategy to SEO, social media, paid ads, and email automation—we deliver full-funnel marketing powered by AI. Grow visibility, leads, and revenue—fast and measurable.

sections.title: Marketing Challenges We Solve
sections.subtitle: Facing these issues?

problems.title: No Visibility or Traction
problems.description: Your brand gets lost in the noise. Organic reach is low, SEO isn't moving the needle, and you're not sure which channels actually drive results.

problems.title: Wasted Ad Spend
problems.description: Paid campaigns burn budget without clear attribution. You're guessing at audiences and creative instead of using data and AI to optimize.

problems.title: Inconsistent Messaging & Channels
problems.description: Social, email, and ads feel disconnected. No unified strategy or content engine—everything is manual and reactive.

problems.title: Manual, Slow Processes
problems.description: Reporting, lead nurturing, and content scheduling eat up time. You need automation and intelligence, not more spreadsheets.

content.empathy_text: We get it. Marketing should be measurable, scalable, and aligned with your business goals. DOTR brings strategy, SEO, paid, social, and email together with an AI-first approach so you grow faster and smarter.

sections.title: Why DOTR for Marketing?

content.headline: Full-Funnel Marketing—Strategy, SEO, Paid, Social, Email—Powered by AI
supporting_points: Complete marketing stack: Digital Strategy, SEO, Social Media Management, Paid Ads, Email Marketing & Automation—one partner, no channel silos
AI-powered targeting, content, and optimization for faster results and better ROI
Data-driven strategy and attribution so you know what works and can scale what wins
Integration with your site, CRM, and workflows (Supabase, n8n) for seamless lead capture and nurturing
Modular, CMS-driven content—every campaign, CTA, and landing page editable from admin

sections.title: Marketing Services FAQ
sections.subtitle: Common questions about our marketing offering

items.question: What marketing services does DOTR offer?
items.answer: We offer five core marketing disciplines: Digital Strategy, SEO, Social Media Management, Paid Ads, and Email Marketing & Automation. You can use one or combine several—we deliver them as a cohesive, full-funnel offering with shared data and AI.

items.question: How do you use AI in marketing?
items.answer: We use AI for targeting and audience optimization, content and creative variation, bidding and budget allocation, and automation (email, social, lead nurturing). Strategy and brand stay human-led; AI helps us execute faster and optimize continuously.

items.question: How fast can I see results?
items.answer: Paid and social campaigns can go live within 2 weeks. SEO and email automation typically show meaningful results within 4–8 weeks. We'll set clear KPIs and milestones during discovery.

items.question: Do you work with our existing tools (CRM, analytics)?
items.answer: Yes. We integrate with your site (e.g. Supabase), CRM, and workflows (n8n). We can connect reporting, lead capture, and nurturing so marketing and sales stay aligned.

items.question: Can you handle both SEO and paid ads?
items.answer: Absolutely. Many clients run SEO for long-term organic growth and paid for immediate pipeline. Having both under one roof means consistent messaging, shared data, and no channel silos.

sections.title: About DOTR
sections.subtitle: AI-First Digital Solutions Company

content.story: DOTR (Dhinoja OmniTech Resolutions) was founded on a simple principle: technology should empower businesses, not complicate them. We're an AI-first company that builds fast, scalable, and future-ready solutions. Our Marketing pillar delivers full-funnel strategy, SEO, paid, social, and email—powered by data and AI.
content.mission: To deliver innovative AI-powered digital solutions that drive real business results and help our clients achieve their goals faster and more efficiently.
content.vision: To be the leading AI-first partner for businesses seeking to transform their digital presence, automate their operations, and unlock their full potential through intelligent technology.
